case_title: ROSA ELISA GONZALEZ VS. VINICIO DE LEON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2011 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-07-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERKL: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. EDGSR SANCHEZ INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
